response: The iPhone 15 Pro is priced at $999 and features a 6.1-inch OLED display, powered by the advanced A17 Pro chip, and equipped with a 48MP main camera along with a 3274mAh battery. It is available in four storage options — 128GB, 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB — and weighs 187 grams. The device has earned an impressive customer rating of 4.6 out of 5, reflecting its strong performance and premium build quality.
